demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult sibling present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain in my stomach is unbearable, I can't stop throwing up, and I feel like I'm fading away.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sibling calling for help: the belly pain and vomiting have not stopped, she is too weak to get out of bed and over the last few hours she has become very drowsy and hard to rouse.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 24 hours ago with a high fever and feeling sick
symptom_narrative.duration: about a day, getting worse the whole time
symptom_narrative.character: constant severe pain all over the stomach with non-stop vomiting and no appetite
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says the pain is unbearable and she feels like she is fading away
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over the belly, not one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there the whole time and steadily worsening
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it keeps getting worse on its own; she can't keep anything down
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: high fever, non-stop vomiting, no appetite, overwhelming weakness so she can't get out of bed, and over the last few hours she has become very drowsy and difficult to wake
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely bedbound and dependent, barely responsive now

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no diagnosed ongoing illnesses that the sibling is aware of
past_medical_history.how_managed: not under any regular medical care

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: her skin has slowly gone darker all over the past few months and she has been extremely tired and run down
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: noticed over the last few months, never checked

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: adult sibling is present, very anxious, and does not feel able to safely manage her deteriorating state at home

objective_data_offered.value: she looks very pale and washed out, her hands feel cold and clammy, she is breathing fast, and she is drowsy and only briefly opens her eyes when spoken to loudly
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: anxious sibling's description over the phone; no measured vital signs available

objective_data_offered.value: skin looks generally darker/tanned all over, including areas not usually exposed to the sun; she appears exhausted and only intermittently responsive on camera
she says she feels faint and like she is fading away, and is too weak to stand
